notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston doubles (16) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Troy Johnston to 3rd. Troy Johnston advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy singles on a line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler. Kyle Karros scores. Edouard Julien to 3rd. Jake McCarthy to 2nd. Jake McCarthy advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Wade Meckler.
